_readme: Overrides for tournaments that ARE officially sanctioned AB Cups but whose raw
FencingTimeLive tournament name does NOT contain 'AB Cup #N' or 'Alberta Cup N'.
The auto-detect regex will already catch names like 'Alberta Cup #1' or 'AB Cup #3'.
Only add tournaments here that need a rename the regex would miss.
Key: sanitized tournament filename basename (spaces -> underscores, illegal chars stripped).
Value: { season: '24/25'|'25/26'|..., cup_number: int, canonical: '24/25 AB Cup #N' }
Anything else in the CSV directory that is NOT an AB Cup keeps its raw name.
Move entries out of 'review_needed' into 'overrides' once confirmed (or delete if not an AB Cup).

Alberta_Cup_#1.note: No year in name. Scraped Jul 12. Regex will auto-label as AB Cup #1 but season needs confirmation.

Alberta_Cup_3_2025_-_Red_Deer.note: Name says '2025' but 'AB Cup 3 - Red Deer' fits a spring 24/25 event. Conflicts with Don_Laszlo (also 24/25 AB Cup #3) — one of these is wrong. Confirm which.

Epic_Fall_Classic_2024.note: Raw name has no AB Cup label. But EFC2024CUP2 also exists — is Epic_Fall_Classic_2024 the SAME event scraped from a different URL, or a different competition? If same as EFC2024CUP2, drop this file / merge with 24/25 AB Cup #2.

Don_Laszlo_Memorial_Cup_2025.note: Don Laszlo has historically been an AB Cup (see 2024 entry). Confirm if 2025 edition is also AB Cup and which number.

Leslie_Palmai_Memorial_Cup.note: Is Leslie Palmai officially an AB Cup? Also both '2024_Leslie_Palmai_Memorial_Cup' and 'Leslie_Palmai_Memorial_Cup' exist — same event twice?

Gladiators_Cup_2025.note: Is Gladiators Cup an AB Cup?

Gladiators_Cup_2026.note: Is Gladiators Cup an AB Cup?

2024_Gladiators_Cup.note: Is Gladiators Cup an AB Cup?
